---
title: Bibhabasu Mohapatra
image: images/bibhabasu.JPG
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 10em
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/bibhabasuM1610
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/bibhabasumohapatra
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/bibhabasu-mohapatra-3b8205193 
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:bibhabasumohapatrabm@gmail.com
    - icon: book
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=u5DLnWYAAAAJ&hl=en
---

Hello and welcome! My name is Bibhabasu Mohapatra, and I am a passionate AI enthusiast dedicated to advancing the field of artificial intelligence.

Currently working as an AI Engineer at Aira Matrix, I'm deeply committed to pushing the boundaries of AI research.

I'm particularly interested in topics related to self-supervised learning, multi-modal learning, and Representations. These areas fascinate me because of their potential to revolutionize AI and address complex challenges in various domains.

Open for Research Opportunities in Academia.
